# Iconify Reference

## Purpose

This area documents how the project uses Iconify as a reference catalog for
open source icons.

## Documents

| Document | Primary Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [Iconify Basic Usage](basic-usage.md) | Explains how to browse icon sets on Iconify, how to choose a license-compatible set, and how this project vendors a small local subset of icons instead of using a CDN runtime. |
